## Contract

## Loading protocol

1. Match task context and target files against the `Trigger / description` column.
2. Read only the matching `Path` values before doing related work.
3. Treat the full `SKILL.md` as the runtime contract.
4. If no matching skill exists, proceed without skill injection and report `skill_resolution: none` when relevant.
